# Bundled FFmpeg

Ptu bundles `ffmpeg.exe` and `ffprobe.exe` so normal Windows users do not need to install FFmpeg manually.

- Source URL: https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/ffmpeg-release-essentials.zip
- Download date: 2026-06-03
- Upstream project: https://ffmpeg.org/
- Legal notes: https://ffmpeg.org/legal.html
- Binary provider: https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/
- License note: Gyan.dev release builds are commonly distributed as GPL builds. Treat these bundled binaries as GPL-covered unless a documented LGPL-only build replaces them before release.
